title: Volatility Reverses the Horizontal-Organization Advantage: ABM and analysis code
description: Agent-based model and analysis code for the working paper "Volatility Reverses the Horizontal-Organization Advantage: How Environmental Turbulence Inverts the Information-Accessibility Prescription for Organizational Structure." Contains the Kauffman NK-landscape ABM, nine experiment drivers (three baseline plus four robustness extensions: seed replication, alternative shock models, multi-level vertical, agent heterogeneity), bootstrap-inference analysis, and the end-to-end manuscript-assembly pipeline. 36,900 simulated runs. Seeds fixed; bit-for-bit reproducible on the same NumPy version. Audit-signed by the author at commit 8a50752 on 2026-04-23.
notes: See AUDIT_CHECKLIST.md in the repository for independent verification steps. An earlier draft contained a simulation bug (shock-propagation in the hybrid branch) that was caught, corrected, and transparently documented in the manuscript.
